title: Bar Screen For Sewage Treatment Plant Pretreatment Mechanical Sel
summary: The YMGS/YMHG rotary bar screen is a solid-liquid separation device that continuously and automatically removes sundries from fluid. It is used as primary pretreatment equipment in urban sewage treatment, water supply, power plants, and industrial facilities.

specs.label: Rake Tooth Material
specs.value: ABS plastic, nylon, or stainless steel

specs.label: Frame Material
specs.value: Stainless steel or carbon steel with antiseptic coating
